evals.expected_output: Metrics table, Guidelines Source line, five scored dimensions summing to a score out of 10, grade band (Excellent/Good/Needs work/Fails), and a Regression Risk section. gtasks is a well-formed skill so expect a Good or Excellent grade with only minor findings.

evals.prompt: review my skill at claude/.claude/skills/clone/SKILL.md — does it follow best practices?
evals.expected_output: Audit report with scored dimensions. clone has a weak description (no 'Use when' trigger phrase, few keywords) so expect Dimension 1 and Dimension 5 to score low, overall grade Needs work or Fails best practices. Findings should specifically call out the missing trigger phrase and weak discoverability.
The skill cannot determine which SKILL.md to audit from the prompt alone. It should ask the user to provide a file path rather than guessing or defaulting to a random file.
